output: copy C:\Python39\python.exe C:\Temp\runner.exe && C:\Temp\runner.exe -m adidnsdump -u DOMAIN\User -p Password ldap://10.10.10.10
explanation: By renaming or copying the python.exe binary to a different name (e.g., runner.exe), the command bypasses the 'Image|endswith: \python.exe' condition of the Sigma rule.
By renaming the adidnsdump script or execution folder to an arbitrary name (e.g., my_dns_enum.py), the command bypasses the 'CommandLine|contains: adidnsdump' condition.
